description: White 50% cotton and 50% modal inner vest with scoop neck and signature Levi's reg tag on hem Wash care Machine wash warm, delicate cycle Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Cool iron as needed Do not dry clean If you need a basic vest to keep you feeling fresh under your shirt and provide a little warmth when the air conditioning gets too cold then you've found it here.
